title: haenkea
intro: Haenkea, also known as Haenkea multiflora, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the Annonaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Haenkea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Haenkea is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for various forms of consumption, including internal use and topical application.
